commands.review_summary:
The PR changes core `/status` and bundled Codex `/codex status` formatters and tests to emit GFM hard-break markers between intentional status rows, including embedded multiline details.

PR surface: Source +7, Tests +8. Total +15 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main builds both status outputs with lone `\n` rows and Telegram rich delivery sends Markdown as rich Markdown without status-specific hard-break conversion. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
